templates.name: Trade program
templates.content: You can read more and apply to our Trade Program here: https://www.spoonflower.com/en/trade

templates.name: Pillow insert sizes
templates.content:
Our pillow insert sizes are:
 
19" x 19" inserts for 18" pillows
21" x 21" inserts for 20" pillows
15" x 25" inserts for Lumbar pillows
14" x 36" inserts for XL Lumbar pillows

templates.name: If I upload my design in order to print it, will it be private?
templates.content:
We value the copyright of all images. The designer owns the rights to their artwork. All designs uploaded to our website are automatically defaulted to private. To make them viewable to the public, you would need to check a box on the design page, and selling your design requires a multi-step seller verification. In short, there are no additional steps you need to take to ensure that your designs are kept private and unavailable for public viewing.
 
To receive commissions for the designs, you would have to be a verified seller.
 
For full information go here: https://spoonflower.attn.tv/sl/gC5SluQd

templates.name: Wallpapers for renters/apartment
templates.content: Thank you for reaching out! I suggest getting the Peel and Stick wallpaper. This type of wallpaper is a popular choice for renters and homeowners who want to quickly change the look of a room without the hassle of water-activation or paper paste required for other wallpaper application methods. Our Peel and Stick Wallpaper can be a budget-friendly option for impactful change in any room with simple, worry-free removal. Hope this helps!

templates.name: Small Business Grant
templates.content: Anyone who has a creative small business is eligible to apply and you can read this blog: https://spoonflower.attn.tv/sl/NpR7QCzm for application tips. Due to volume, our Collaboration Submissions are currently closed and will re-open in November with no definite date. For time-sensitive inquiries, please reach out to collab@spoonflower.com.

templates.name: How long would it take to receive the samples?
templates.content: Would you be ordering a sample of fabric or wallpaper? Our current production times are 2-4 days for fabric and 5-7 days for wallpaper.

templates.name: Phone call request
templates.content: I apologize for the inconvenience! I've reached out to my team and asked one of my colleagues to reach out to you directly.

templates.name: Warranty policy
templates.content: You can take a look at our Happiness Guarantee here: https://www.spoonflower.com/en/happiness-guarantee

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can read more and sign up for our program here: https://blog.spoonflower.com/ambassadorfaq/

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We don't currently offer free shipping, but all promos will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out.

templates.name: Knit Fabrics
templates.content: I would recommend checking this page out to learn more about our knit fabrics https://support.spoonflower.com/hc/en-us/articles/204468750

templates.name: Upholstery Fabrics
templates.content: I would recommend checking this page out to learn more about our upholstery fabrics https://support.spoonflower.com/hc/en-us/articles/4420653893773

templates.name: Quilting Fabrics
templates.content: I would recommend checking this page out to learn more about our quilting fabrics https://support.spoonflower.com/hc/en-us/articles/4420653809805

templates.name: What are the inserts made of
templates.content: Our square throw pillow inserts are made of polyfill with a polyester nonwoven cover. Pillow covers may be purchased with or without an insert. If you choose to purchase the pillow cover only, we recommend an insert one to two inches larger than your cover for the fullest look.

templates.name: Do any of your products come lined?
templates.content: No, none of our curtain products come with lining.

templates.name: Can I use other hexadecimal colors than the ones that are on the color map? I'm using Adobe Photoshop/Illustrator.
templates.content: You can use any colors you want when creating your design, we offer the color map to give artists an idea of how color presents on fabric vs on their device screen, as there can be some differences.

templates.name: Product too expensive (specific brand temp)
templates.content: We believe we price our products as fairly as possible, we pay artists one of the highest commissions in the industry and we've also had amazing feedback from our customers! Enjoy if you decide to go for it at any point, and definitely keep an eye out for upcoming sales.

templates.name: Can I heart/favorite items in your website?
templates.content: We do offer the ability to "heart" or "favorite" designs. You simply need to create a free account and log in to store your favorites. https://support.spoonflower.com/hc/en-us/articles/4416088177165-Banner-Icons-Account-Preferences-Favorites-User-Icon-Shopping-Cart#THREE

templates.name: Can I get fabric in 1/2 yard pieces?
templates.content: While we don't offer 1/2 yards, you can use our "Fill-A-Yard" tool to fill one yard of fabric with 2 different designs at no additional cost: https://www.spoonflower.com/fill-a-yard

templates.name: What would you recommend for textured walls?
templates.content: We recommend our Pebble or Grasscloth type of paper for any walls with texture. You can learn about these paper types here: https://www.spoonflower.com/en/wallpaper

templates.name: Social Media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/spoonflower/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/spoonflower

templates.name: What couriers do you use?
templates.content: It actually depends on the kind of shipping you use at checkout! You can check out this link for more information: https://support.spoonflower.com/hc/en-us/articles/204444710-Shipping-Rates-and-Delivery-Options

templates.name: Where can I find the book of solid swatch colors?
templates.content: You can order a solid swatch book here: https://www.spoonflower.com/en/petal-solids-swatch-book

templates.name: What kind of wallpaper can be used on RV walls?
templates.content: For RV walls, we recommend checking out our Prepasted Removable Smooth Wallpaper. We suggest applying it to a surface that's a solid, light color. Additionally, allow 4 weeks for any freshly painted or primed walls to fully cure. More information about this product can be found here: https://support.spoonflower.com/hc/en-us/articles/206335696-Prepasted-Removable-Smooth-Wallpaper You may also like our Peel and Stick, but we have some concerns about it not adhering well in an environment that may get really hot. More details about it can be found here as well: https://support.spoonflower.com/hc/en-us/articles/206335716-Peel-and-Stick-Removable-Woven-Wallpaper  Lastly, we highly recommend purchasing swatches before you order in quantity. It's the best way to determine if a product will suit your needs. Our Wallpaper swatches are 2' x 1' and you can apply and remove these particular two to test them out.

templates.name: Are your fabrics printed to order?
templates.content: All of our fabrics are printed to order. That way we can be more sustainable in only creating what you need, you can read more about it here: https://www.spoonflower.com/en/how-it-works

templates.name: Do you offer a flannel fabric?
templates.content: Flannel is a type of fabric that we don't offer. The closest would be fleece, check it out here: https://www.spoonflower.com/en/fleece

templates.name: Can the wallpaper be used in the bathroom ?
templates.content: Some of our employees have used our Smooth wallpaper in bathrooms, but we have heard mention of peeling at the seams, however, wallpaper seam adhesive from a home improvement store seemed to easily take care of this minor issue. If you're considering using our wallpaper in your bathroom, we'd encourage you to order a test swatch prior to committing to a larger order. Ordering a sample will allow you to feel the full weight of the wallpaper and to test how it works under different conditions. This way you can be sure as to whether it will be suitable for your home. Depending on the moisture level of your bathroom, you may be interested in our Pebble Traditional commercial grade wallpaper. Water and moisture don't make the ink run, and it is rated for use in higher moisture areas and is mildew resistant. To find out more about this wallpaper, go here: https://spoonflower.attn.tv/sl/p7slUe6U

templates.name: Can you use wallpaper over other wallpaper?
templates.content: Unfortunately, we haven't tested this over other wallpaper, or over other paper that has also been primed over. You can always order a test swatch first to apply on your unique surface prior to any larger order and test out the installation process.

templates.name: How can I make sure my design is the color I want?
templates.content: The easiest way to get the colors you want is to create your design using our color map or guide. We recommend working in the sRGB color space both because it produces beautiful color prints and because our Color Guide and Map (in sRGB color) will be more useful to you as color management tools. To check the process out in detail, feel free to visit this page: https://spoonflower.attn.tv/sl/iUNAiU1Y

templates.name: Can I edit the scale of the design on the website?
templates.content: If you want to edit the size or scale of the design on the website, you'll need to reach out to the designer directly to request a custom-sized version be made for you to order. We can't change the scale for you since each design on our website was uploaded by an individual designer who retains the rights to their designs. You can reach out to them by clicking the designer's name in teal on the right-hand side of the design page, and clicking on the contact button. Most designers are happy to provide custom requests!

templates.name: Cancel/edit
templates.content: We can't make any changes to a processing order. If you need to cancel your order, please email help@spoonflower.com with your order number and a cancellation request.

templates.name: Does the artist profit from this fabric? (Or earn commission)
templates.content: As a seller on Spoonflower, every time someone purchases one of your designs you'll earn a base commission of 10% of the full retail price of the fabric or wallpaper sale.

templates.name: I'm having trouble finding a specific fabric
templates.content: This site should help you find what you're looking for: https://www.spoonflower.com/en/fabric-shop/cotton-fabric

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: All of our products are printed, cut, sewn, and shipped from our factories in the USA.

templates.name: Are your fabrics reversible? How do they feel?
templates.content: All of our fabric options are printed on one side. The best way to know how a fabric will look and feel would be to order a test swatch of the fabric and design that you're interested in. To order a test swatch, locate the "Size" drop down menu to the right of the design image and choose the test swatch option. They're 8x8 inches in size and are $5 each. You can also find out more about any of our products and order a $19 Sample Pack containing tags of all our fabric and paper products here: https://www.spoonflower.com/en/sample-pack

templates.name: Return Policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://support.spoonflower.com/hc/en-us/articles/204444690-Returns-and-Exchanges

templates.name: Wholesale Inquiries
templates.content: You can learn more about bulk and wholesale orders here: https://support.spoonflower.com/hc/en-us/articles/204444720-Bulk-Fabric-Wholesale-Pricing-and-Designer-Discounts

templates.name: How many rolls of wallpaper do I need for my room?
templates.content: We have an amazing tool that you can use to calculate how many rolls you'll need. You can find more info here: https://support.spoonflower.com/hc/en-us/articles/206212550#estimate

templates.name: Customer Support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to reach out to customer support directly via our Contact Us form at this link: https://support.spoonflower.com/hc/en-us/requests/new?ticket_form_id=360001159372 Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: If someone has a design picked but wants a slightly different color or variation
templates.content: You can always message the designer with the instructions on this page. Some are happy to make new designs: https://support.spoonflower.com/hc/en-us/articles/204444670-Customizing-Marketplace-Designs#:~:text=Contacting%20a%20Spoonflower%20Artist,-If%20you%20want&text=Click%20on%20the%20artist's%20underlined,2)%20when%20you%20reach%20out

templates.name: Do you print continuous yards?
templates.content: For continuous yards/meters enter the desired length into 'amount' before clicking "Add to Cart". For example, entering "4" into this field will print 4 continuous yards/meters. For individual yard(s)/meter(s), add the desired length to your cart one at a time. If you want four 1m pieces, enter "1" for amount, then click "Add to Cart". Repeat this step three times.

templates.name: Do you sell on eBay, Amazon, etc?
templates.content: Yes, we do sell our products on ebay (as well as amazon, etsy, and walmart) The titles may be different due to various different factors.

templates.name: Redeem a gift card
templates.content: To redeem a gift card, enter your code on this page: https://www.spoonflower.com/gift_certificates This will show up in your account as Spoondollars that can be applied at checkout.

templates.name: What fabric can I change to make the image complete?
templates.content: Generally speaking, the design layout page will reflect how your design will be printed after you have selected the fabric type and size you would like it to print on. Be sure to do this on a desktop or laptop computer, as not all mobile devices are compatible with our site. Keep in mind that the preview window on a desktop computer is the best way to predict how a design will print. If you change the fabric type and quantity in the drop-down menu to the right of the preview, the window will expand or contract to show how much of the design will print onto that type and amount of fabric. The rulers along the edge of the preview are also a great way to estimate the finished size of a print.

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: To begin any return or reimbursement request, please use our contact form available here: https://www.spoonflower.com/en/contact We ask that you contact us first regarding items you wish to return. We're unable to process a return that's sent to us without any prior communication. Returning prior to approval can also delay the time your request can be processed.

templates.name: What is the best swimsuit fabric?
templates.content: If you're looking to make a swimsuit, your best choice is our Sport Lycra fabric. It's a medium-weight and nearly opaque with 4-way stretch, plus it has UPF protection that stands up to swimming pools and saltwater alike! https://www.spoonflower.com/en/sport-lycra

templates.name: Can I place an order over the phone?
templates.content: We are not able to process orders by phone at this time, though I'll definitely pass this along to the team to consider in the future and thank you for the feedback!

templates.name: How long does it take to get a refund?
templates.content: Funds generally take about 3 to 5 business days to be returned to your bank account after a refund has been processed. It can take up to 30 days occasionally. You may also receive an email confirmation once a refund is processed for your order.

templates.name: Does proofing take time?
templates.content: Please note that proofing fabrics to make them eligible for sale to others does take some time, especially if the designer lives overseas and must wait longer for their proofing order to reach them.

templates.name: What is the weight (oz) per yard of your dress linen fabric?
templates.content: Linen Cotton Canvas is 54" wide, 6.4 oz per sq yard, Belgian Linen is 54" wide, 9.8 oz per sq yard and our Performance Linen is 54" wide, 7.6 oz per sq yard.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Standard delivery orders are printed with our standard print and processing timeframes which you can check out here: https://support.spoonflower.com/hc/en-us/articles/209604846 The time to print an order with standard delivery will vary based upon the general volume of orders currently processing, while Rush and Guaranteed Services will print in 2 and 5 days, respectively.

templates.name: I don't know what kind of fabric or wallpaper to choose. Do you offer samples?
templates.content: You can check out our Sample Pack here: https://www.spoonflower.com/en/sample-pack Each sample pack contains a 4" x 4" colorfully printed swatch of each of our fabrics, plus printed samples of wallpaper.

templates.name: Do you provide prepaid return labels?
templates.content: We don't offer prepaid return labels. Once we have approved your return request and provided any additional instructions with the return shipping address most suitable for your location, simply choose the shipping service that's most affordable or convenient for you.

templates.name: Do you ship to APO, FPO and DPO Addresses?
templates.content: We're able to ship to APO locations, as well as FPO and DPO locations. To do that, select "United States" as the country for the address. These orders must ship by USPS, and any Guaranteed or Rush Delivery orders will automatically be sent by this carrier unless an alternate non-PO address can be provided.

templates.name: What is the Print-on demand?
templates.content: You can check this article for more info about that: https://support.spoonflower.com/hc/en-us/articles/4413826031885-Welcome-to-Spoonflower-The-Print-on-Demand-Difference

templates.name: What is a fat quarter?
templates.content: A fat quarter is 1/2 the width and 1/2 the length of a yard. Here's an article we wrote called Fat Quarters 101 that gives you all the details: https://blog.spoonflower.com/2020/10/12/spoonflower-fat-quarters-101/

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you?

templates.name: I ordered too much wallpaper. Can I return the unused items?
templates.content: Each order is print-on-demand and there's no way to restock extra rolls or wallpaper. Leftover rolls also can be used for unexpected or magical coordinating projects.

templates.name: Can I make changes / customize a fabric on your website?
templates.content:
If you're interested in customizing an existing design created by a designer other than yourself, we recommend that you contact the designer directly to make requests. 

To send a message to a designer, please log in to your Spoonflower account and click on the designer's name below the design title. Click on the "Contact" button below the designer's profile picture to send a message to the designer. Designers also sometimes include links to other websites on their profiles through which you could contact them instead if you prefer.

templates.name: When a customer is interested in a fabric design that is not yet available for sale on wallpaper
templates.content: The designs on our site are uploaded by independent designers from across the world. If a design isn't yet available for sale on the wallpaper, you're welcome to contact the designer directly to inquire about the possibility of their making the design available. If you have an account with us, you should see the option to send them a message through their public profile. Click on the designer's name in teal to be taken to their shop page, click on the "Contact" button below their profile picture to send a message. Designers also sometimes include links to other websites on their profiles through which you could contact them instead if you prefer.

templates.name: Military/First responder/Teacher/Student discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! As a show of gratitude, we're happy to offer you a 15% discount. Simply look for the ID.me verification in your cart as you complete your order. Click the "Verify" button and follow the steps!

templates.name: Are your fabrics machine washable?
templates.content: Yes, all our fabrics are machine washable. We heat-fix all our fabrics after printing to render them permanent, but pigment-ink printed fabrics generally do need gentler handling than many other fabrics. We recommend that you wash most of our fabrics in cold or warm water using phosphate-free detergent in very light loads for best results. You should expect to see slight fading upon first washing, but it should stabilize after that. Please find care instructions particular to each of our fabrics here: https://spoonflower.attn.tv/sl/r_PRai1l

templates.name: Can you retroactively apply the code to my order?
templates.content:
I'm afraid we don't have a way to apply a promotional discount retroactively to an order. If your order hasn't been shipped yet, you can try to request a cancellation and place a new order using the code. 

To cancel your order, please reach out to our team here: https://spoonflower.attn.tv/sl/wKvsA6VK They'll be happy to help!

templates.name: How do I care for my Spoonflower products?
templates.content: We've actually put together a detailed guide on how you can care for your Spoonflower products:  https://support.spoonflower.com/hc/en-us/articles/204444760-Caring-for-Your-Spoonflower-Products

templates.name: Can you order samples of wallpaper?
templates.content: Absolutely! You can select the Swatch 2' x 1' option in the size menu on the wallpapers' product pages.

templates.name: Types of Wallpaper available
templates.content: We offer 4 types of wallpaper and you can learn more about them here: https://www.spoonflower.com/en/wallpaper

templates.name: What kind of fabric/design is used on the front/back of the Minky blanket?
templates.content: Minky blankets are actually double-sided, meaning that it will be the same design on the front and back.

templates.name: Etsy
templates.content: Please reach out to us directly through Etsy! There, our dedicated help team will be able to assist you.

templates.name: If customers want to use the 'Spin To Win' code again
templates.content:
I'm sorry for any confusion, but the "Spin to Win" feature on our site generates a one-time-use code for those who have not signed up for emails/text messaging in the past. Therefore, if you unsubscribe and sign up again later, it will send you the same code you have already used, which would be inactive. 

The fine print linked in the pop-up can be found here: https://try.spoonflower.com/promos-3/ 

We are sorry if this was unclear. However, since you are signed up for our communications, you'll be the first to know about any other sitewide promotions or other discounts that may apply to you in the future.

templates.name: Do you offer stencils of your designes?
templates.content:
All designs uploaded to Spoonflower are put there by individual designers, and unfortunately, we do not offer something like that at this time. However, you can contact the designer directly to inquire if they may be able to create something like that for you.
 
To send a message to a designer, log in to your Spoonflower account and click on the designer's name below the design title. Click on the "Contact" button below the designer's profile picture to send a message to the designer. Designers also sometimes include links to other websites on their profiles through which you could contact them instead if you prefer.

templates.name: Are your fabrics printed all the way through or on one side only?
templates.content: All fabrics are printed on one side, and the other side is white.

templates.name: How do I upload multiple images into my design?
templates.content:
Thank you for choosing us! To upload multiple images into your design:

1. Go to the Upload Your Design page.
2. Click "Choose File" and select up to 10 files from your computer. Make sure you're logged in to upload multiple files.

For more details:
- Upload guide: https://spoonflower.attn.tv/afip7SEoT0_q
- Design layout guide: https://spoonflower.attn.tv/anlrMHC8w-Ns

If you need more help, I would be happy to assist you!

templates.name: Can I return the test swatches?
templates.content: Test swatches are intended to help you see a product in person and make a decision on your final order. Purchasing a physical test swatch is the best way to be sure the color, scale, and product choice will work for your project. Because test swatches are also printed on demand, they are not eligible to be returned for a credit or refund.
